creator: olevole@olevole.ru
text:
(In reply to R. Christian McDonald from comment #0)

LGTM!

Unfortunately, I can’t check the new version in production right now (don’t have time).
Also, two bugfix releases were released quite recently: https://github.com/simdjson/simdjson/releases/tag/v3.6.2

Perhaps it makes sense to commit the update to 3.6.2?
